raw_text: joris vandermeulen telephone +34 684 235 284 address calle del locum 15 email vdm.joris@gmail.com 45001 toledo skype jorisvandermeulen spain personal information birth date 20 february 1989 birth place belgium nationality belgian gender man employment history 2015-2016 junior data engineer at predicube (full-time) e developed or assisted in developing and optimising: o automated analysis of predicube data o dataflow from raw files to spark to mysql database predicube dashboard o predicube cookie e assisting in design decisions 2012-2015 research engineer at ku leuven university (full-time) e researched sound analysis for livestock animals in an international environment o scream sound detection for pigs o couch sound detection for calves in collaboration with animal scientists and/or farmers e composed proceedings book and academic program of ec-plf 2013 conference e presented research results at two international conferences academic output journal papers: e discerning pig screams in production environment published in plosone e early recognition of bovine respiratory disease in calves using automated continuous monitoring of cough sounds published in compag education 2010-2012 master of science in electrical engineering: multimedia and signal-processing with elective courses in data mining ku leuven, leuven grade: cum laude 71.83% 2007-2010 bachelor of science in engineering: electrical-mechanical engineering ku leuven, leuven grade: cum laude 68.85% languages dutch mother tongue english good french intermediate spanish beginner german beginner other experience driving license b computer knowledge programming python, pyspark good programming javaandc, basic linux, docker sufficient mysql database, sufficient math program, matlab, good microsoft office (word, excel, powerpoint), good
